examples: We are lagging behind in the childcare stakes.
The lantern was far ahead, and he could not help lagging behind a little in the darkness.
Fiat in Italy is closing all of its production plants for one month because of lagging car sales in Europe.
Sun Microsystems, the other ringleader of the anti-Microsoft circus, is also lagging in its efforts.
But it matters also because Samsung is lagging in the tablet market, not in smartphones.
